raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California Governor Gavin Newsom signed the Gun Violence Prevention and School Safety Act into law.",
    "Assembly Bill (AB) 28 will impose an 11 percent excise tax on the sale of guns and ammunition by gun manufacturers and dealers.",
    "The excise tax from AB 28 is expected to generate $160 million annually for school safety and violence prevention programs.",
    "AB 28 aims to fund initiatives to prevent mass shootings and bolster firearm investigations.",
    "The Gun Violence Prevention and School Safety Act is supported by major gun safety organizations.",
    "California has made significant investments to address the harms caused by gun violence.",
    "The firearm death rate for American children increased by 40 percent between 2018 and 2021.",
    "Gun deaths and injuries cost California billions annually, most of which is paid by taxpayers.",
    "Funding from the California Violence Intervention and Prevention (CalVIP) program has proven effective at reducing gun violence.",
    "AB 28 establishes the Gun Violence Prevention and School Safety Fund to support various initiatives aimed at preventing gun violence."
  ]
}
```
